query:
INSERT INTO countries (name, code, isActive) VALUES 
('Egypt', 'EG', 1),
('Jordan', 'JO', 1),
('Lebanon', 'LB', 1),
('Iraq', 'IQ', 1),
('Syria', 'SY', 1),
('Yemen', 'YE', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
